divisions.title: Fellowship with God
divisions.summary: God is light, confess sin to have fellowship, Jesus is our advocate, love is keeping his commands and loving one another

divisions.title: Love One Another
divisions.summary: We are God's children, love in deed and truth, test the spirits, God is love, we love because he first loved us

divisions.title: Assurance
divisions.summary: Faith overcomes the world, testimony of God about his Son, we have eternal life through believing in Jesus

chapterSummaries.1: God is light, walk in the light, confess sin and be cleansed
chapterSummaries.2: Jesus is our advocate, keep his commands, love one another, beware of antichrists
chapterSummaries.3: Children of God, purify yourselves, love in deed and truth, not just words
chapterSummaries.4: Test the spirits, God is love, we love because he first loved us
chapterSummaries.5: Faith overcomes the world, testimony about the Son, we have eternal life
